---
title: "Welcome to My Portfolio"
---

::: {.card}
Hi, my name is **Vianey Villegas**, and I am a student interested in marketing managment, digital marketing, and creative strategy.

This portfolio shares a few projects I have worked on while learning how brands use data to understand customers, improve campaigns, and communicate more effectively.
:::

## About Me

I am currently building my skills in marketing analytics, digital marketing, and data storytelling. I enjoy projects that combine creativity with startegy, like filming content for social media. 

## Career Interest

My goal is to work in a digital marketing related role where I can help a company understand its audience, improve campaign performance, and make better decisions using data.

## Skills I Am Learning

- Marketing analytics  
- Social media strategy  
- Google Analytics  
- Data visualization  
- R and Quarto  
- Dashboard design
